inline_comments.message: not sure but isn't there some other procedure to handle go.sum files? Is it ok to modify it here?

To be honest I'm not sure what's the cleanest way to handle it. From one side, I was thinking to update upstream repository providing changed go.sum, but I couldn't find information how to contribute in https://git.opnfv.org/ovn4nfv-k8s-plugin project.

I'm welcome to correct it further, but at this point I'm not sure of better option.
Of course this could be not needed when still using older go version, as it was before, but in such scenario there is mismatch between used golang binaries for `ovn4nfv` and `ovn-kubernetes` addons, as well as `k8splugin` itself.
